holdings.infoBox: WTV is an equity ETF with a total of 120 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 3.57%, Zoom Communications at 2.16%, Salesforce at 1.97%, Citigroup at 1.72%, and Target at 1.70%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree US Value Fund of Benef Interest (WTV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed using a model-based selection process. It aims to identify US large- and mid-cap stocks that provide a high total shareholder yield with quality characteristics. WTV was launched on Feb 23, 2007 and is issued by WisdomTree.
